conversations.content: Today we studied the Thunder Bluff Elders' Territorial Defense Code. If a Grimtotem tribe's fire totem is found...
Grimtotem's fire totem? They want to burn Thunder Bluff! How do you defend?
then unleash an earth totem shock, then extinguish the flames within the camp area.
Earth shock to break the totem, then put out the fire — solid! Any other threats?
If the raiding dust cloud of a centaur tribe is detected, then shoot wind arrows as a warning, then set up thorn traps to seal the entrance.
Wind arrow warning plus thorn traps — seal the entrance, nice! What's the third scenario?
If the vile voodoo curse of a shadow hunter is sensed, then hurl a purification soul totem, then dispel the mind-control fog.
Purification totem plus dispel fog — break the voodoo! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?
If any of the above situations occurs, then sound the blood gong, raise all platform elevators of Thunder Bluff, and summon elementals to reinforce the defense line.

think: Thunder Bluff Elders' Territorial Defense: three threats: Grimtotem fire totem → earth totem shock + extinguish flames; centaur raiding dust cloud → wind arrow warning + thorn traps; shadow hunter voodoo curse → purification soul totem + dispel mind-control fog. Any case → sound blood gong + raise all Thunder Bluff elevators + summon elementals to reinforce defense.
memory: Thunder Bluff Elders' Territorial Defense Code: If a Grimtotem tribe's fire totem is found, then unleash an earth totem shock, then extinguish the flames within the camp area; if the raiding dust cloud of a centaur tribe is detected, then shoot wind arrows as a warning, then set up thorn traps to seal the entrance; if the vile voodoo curse of a shadow hunter is sensed, then hurl a purification soul totem, then dispel the mind-control fog; if any of the above situations occurs, then sound the blood gong, raise all platform elevators of Thunder Bluff, and summon elementals to reinforce the defense line.
